tEn: SV3D: Novel Multi-view Synthesis and 3D Generation from a Single Image using Latent Video Diffusion
tZh: SV3D：基于潜在视频扩散的单图像新颖多视图合成与3D生成
sEn: SV3D adapts image-to-video diffusion for consistent multi-view synthesis and 3D generation from a single image.
sZh: SV3D将图像到视频扩散模型用于一致的多视图合成和单图像3D生成。
absEn: We present Stable Video 3D (SV3D) -- a latent video diffusion model for high-resolution, image-to-multi-view generation of orbital videos around a 3D object. Recent work on 3D generation propose techniques to adapt 2D generative models for novel view synthesis (NVS) and 3D optimization. However, these methods have several disadvantages due to either limited views or inconsistent NVS, thereby affecting the performance of 3D object generation. In this work, we propose SV3D that adapts image-to-video diffusion model for novel multi-view synthesis and 3D generation, thereby leveraging the generalization and multi-view consistency of the video models, while further adding explicit camera control for NVS. We also propose improved 3D optimization techniques to use SV3D and its NVS outputs for image-to-3D generation. Extensive experimental results on multiple datasets with 2D and 3D metrics as well as user study demonstrate SV3D's state-of-the-art performance on NVS as well as 3D reconstruction compared to prior works.
absZh: 我们提出了Stable Video 3D（SV3D）——一种潜在视频扩散模型，用于从单张图像生成围绕3D物体的高分辨率、多视角轨道视频。最近的3D生成工作提出了将2D生成模型适配到新视角合成（NVS）和3D优化的技术。然而，这些方法由于视角有限或NVS不一致而存在若干缺点，从而影响3D物体生成的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了SV3D，它将图像到视频扩散模型适配到新颖多视图合成和3D生成，从而利用了视频模型的泛化能力和多视图一致性，同时进一步为NVS添加了显式相机控制。我们还提出了改进的3D优化技术，以使用SV3D及其NVS输出进行图像到3D生成。在多个数据集上的大量实验结果（包括2D和3D指标以及用户研究）表明，与先前工作相比，SV3D在NVS和3D重建方面达到了最先进的性能。

contrib.en: Proposes SV3D, a latent video diffusion model for novel multi-view synthesis and 3D generation from a single image.
contrib.zh: 提出SV3D，一种用于从单张图像进行新颖多视图合成和3D生成的潜在视频扩散模型。

contrib.en: Adapts image-to-video diffusion model with explicit camera pose control for multi-view consistent novel view synthesis.
contrib.zh: 将图像到视频扩散模型与显式相机姿态控制相结合，实现多视图一致的新颖视图合成。

contrib.en: Introduces triangle classifier-free guidance scaling for improved orbital video quality.
contrib.zh: 引入三角形无分类器引导缩放，提升轨道视频质量。

contrib.en: Proposes disentangled illumination model and masked score distillation sampling loss for high-quality 3D generation.
contrib.zh: 提出解耦照明模型和掩码分数蒸馏采样损失，用于高质量3D生成。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on novel view synthesis and 3D reconstruction across multiple datasets.
contrib.zh: 在多个数据集上的新颖视图合成和3D重建中达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong generalization to real-world images and user preference in human studies.
contrib.zh: 在真实世界图像上展示强泛化能力，并在用户研究中获得偏好。

limits.en: SV3D only handles 2 degrees of freedom (elevation and azimuth) for camera control.
limits.zh: SV3D仅处理相机控制的2个自由度（仰角和方位角）。

limits.en: View inconsistency for mirror-like reflective surfaces, challenging 3D reconstruction.
limits.zh: 镜面反射表面的视图不一致，给3D重建带来挑战。

limits.en: Lambertian shading model cannot represent reflective surfaces.
limits.zh: 朗伯着色模型无法表示反射表面。

limits.en: Requires large computational resources for training (4 nodes of 8 A100 GPUs for 6 days).
limits.zh: 训练需要大量计算资源（4节点8块A100 GPU，6天）。

limits.en: SDS loss can cause unstable training and artifacts if applied naively.
limits.zh: SDS损失若简单应用可能导致训练不稳定和伪影。

items.en: We present Stable Video 3D (SV3D) — a latent video diffusion model for high-resolution, image-to-multi-view generation of orbital videos around a 3D object. Recent work on 3D generation propose techniques to adapt 2D generative models for novel view synthesis (NVS) and 3D optimization. However, these methods have several disadvantages due to either limited views or inconsistent NVS, thereby affecting the performance of 3D object generation. In this work, we propose SV3D that adapts image-to-video diffusion model for novel multi-view synthesis and 3D generation, thereby leveraging the generalization and multi-view consistency of the video models, while further adding explicit camera control for NVS. We also propose improved 3D optimization techniques to use SV3D and its NVS outputs for image-to-3D generation. Extensive experimental results on multiple datasets with 2D and 3D metrics as well as user study demonstrate SV3D’s state-of-the-art performance on NVS as well as 3D reconstruction compared to prior works.
items.zh: 我们提出了 Stable Video 3D (SV3D)——一种用于从单张图像生成围绕 3D 物体的轨道视频的高分辨率、图像到多视角生成的潜在视频扩散模型。近期关于 3D 生成的工作提出了将 2D 生成模型应用于新视角合成 (NVS) 和 3D 优化的技术。然而，这些方法由于视角有限或 NVS 不一致而存在若干缺点，从而影响 3D 物体生成的性能。在本工作中，我们提出了 SV3D，它将图像到视频扩散模型应用于新视角合成和 3D 生成，从而利用了视频模型的泛化能力和多视角一致性，同时进一步为 NVS 添加了显式相机控制。我们还提出了改进的 3D 优化技术，以使用 SV3D 及其 NVS 输出进行图像到 3D 生成。在多个数据集上使用 2D 和 3D 指标以及用户研究的广泛实验结果表明，与先前工作相比，SV3D 在 NVS 和 3D 重建方面均达到了最先进的性能。

items.en: Single-image 3D object reconstruction is a long-standing problem in computer vision with a wide range of applications in game design, AR/VR, e-commerce, robotics, etc. It is a highly challenging and ill-posed problem as it requires lifting 2D pixels to 3D space while also reasoning about the unseen portions of the object in 3D.
items.zh: 单图像 3D 物体重建是计算机视觉中一个长期存在的问题，在游戏设计、AR/VR、电子商务、机器人等领域有广泛应用。这是一个高度挑战性和不适定问题，因为它需要将 2D 像素提升到 3D 空间，同时还要推理物体在 3D 中的不可见部分。

items.en: Despite being a long-standing vision problem, it is only recently that practically useful results are being produced by leveraging advances in the generative AI. This is mainly made possible by the large-scale pretraining of generative models which enables sufficient generalization to various domains. A typical strategy is to use image-based 2D generative models (e.g., Imagen [41], Stable Diffusion (SD) [39]) to provide a 3D optimization loss function for unseen novel views of a given object [36, 30, 22]. In addition, several works repurpose these 2D generative models to perform novel view synthesis (NVS) from a single image [25, 26, 52, 29], and then use the synthesized novel views for 3D generation. Conceptually, these works mimic a typical photogrammetry-based 3D object capture pipeline, i.e., first photographing multi-view images of an object, followed by 3D optimization; except that the explicit multi-view capture is replaced by novel-view synthesis using a generative model, either via text prompt or camera pose control.
items.zh: 尽管这是一个长期存在的视觉问题，但直到最近，通过利用生成式 AI 的进展才产生了实际有用的结果。这主要得益于生成模型的大规模预训练，使其能够充分泛化到各种领域。一种典型策略是使用基于图像的 2D 生成模型（例如 Imagen [41]、Stable Diffusion (SD) [39]）为给定物体的未见新视角提供 3D 优化损失函数 [36, 30, 22]。此外，一些工作将这些 2D 生成模型重新用于从单张图像进行新视角合成 (NVS) [25, 26, 52, 29]，然后使用合成的新视角进行 3D 生成。从概念上讲，这些工作模仿了典型的基于摄影测量的 3D 物体捕捉流程，即先拍摄物体的多视角图像，然后进行 3D 优化；不同之处在于，显式的多视角捕捉被使用生成模型（通过文本提示或相机姿态控制）进行的新视角合成所取代。

items.en: A key issue in these generation-based reconstruction methods is the lack of multi-view consistency in the underlying generative model resulting in inconsistent novel views. Some works [26, 6, 15] try to address the multi-view consistency by jointly reasoning a 3D representation during NVS, but this comes at the cost of high computational and data requirements, often still resulting in unsatisfactory results with inconsistent geometric and texture details. In this work, we tackle these issues by adapting a high-resolution, image-conditioned video diffusion model for NVS followed by 3D generation.
items.zh: 这些基于生成的 3D 重建方法中的一个关键问题是底层生成模型缺乏多视角一致性，导致生成不一致的新视角。一些工作 [26, 6, 15] 试图通过在 NVS 过程中联合推理 3D 表示来解决多视角一致性问题，但这以高计算和数据需求为代价，且通常仍会导致几何和纹理细节不一致的令人不满意的结果。在本工作中，我们通过将高分辨率、图像条件化的视频扩散模型应用于 NVS 并随后进行 3D 生成来解决这些问题。

items.en: Novel Multi-view Synthesis. We adapt a latent video diffusion model (Stable Video Diffusion - SVD [2]) to generate multiple novel views of a given object with explicit camera pose conditioning. SVD demonstrates excellent multi-view consistency for video generation, and we repurpose it for NVS. In addition, SVD also has good generalization capabilities as it is trained on large-scale image and video data that are more readily available than large-scale 3D data. In short, we adapt the video diffusion model for NVS from a single image with three useful properties for 3D object generation: pose-controllable, multi-view consistent, and generalizable. We call our resulting NVS network ‘SV3D’. To our knowledge, this is the first work that adapts a video diffusion model for explicit pose-controlled view synthesis. Some contemporary works such as [2, 28] demonstrate the use of video models for view synthesis, but they typically only generate orbital videos without any explicit camera control.
items.zh: 新多视角合成。我们将潜在视频扩散模型（Stable Video Diffusion - SVD [2]）应用于生成给定物体的多个新视角，并带有显式相机姿态条件。SVD 在视频生成方面表现出卓越的多视角一致性，我们将其重新用于 NVS。此外，SVD 还具有良好的泛化能力，因为它是在大规模图像和视频数据上训练的，这些数据比大规模 3D 数据更容易获得。简而言之，我们将视频扩散模型应用于从单张图像进行 NVS，并具有对 3D 物体生成有用的三个特性：姿态可控、多视角一致和可泛化。我们将由此得到的 NVS 网络称为 'SV3D'。据我们所知，这是第一个将视频扩散模型用于显式姿态控制视角合成的工作。一些同期工作如 [2, 28] 展示了使用视频模型进行视角合成，但它们通常只生成没有显式相机控制的轨道视频。

items.en: 3D Generation. We then utilize our SV3D model for 3D object generation by optimizing a NeRF and DMTet mesh in a coarse-to-fine manner. Benefiting from the multi-view consistency in SV3D, we are able to produce high-quality 3D meshes directly from the SV3D novel view images. We also design a masked score distillation sampling (SDS) [36] loss to further enhance 3D quality in the regions that are not visible in the SV3D-predicted novel views. In addition, we propose to jointly optimize a disentangled illumination model along with 3D shape and texture, effectively reducing the issue of baked-in lighting.
items.zh: 3D 生成。然后，我们通过以从粗到细的方式优化 NeRF 和 DMTet 网格，利用我们的 SV3D 模型进行 3D 物体生成。得益于 SV3D 中的多视角一致性，我们能够直接从 SV3D 新视角图像生成高质量的 3D 网格。我们还设计了一种掩码得分蒸馏采样 (SDS) [36] 损失，以进一步增强在 SV3D 预测的新视角中不可见区域的 3D 质量。此外，我们提出联合优化一个解耦的照明模型以及 3D 形状和纹理，有效减少了烘焙光照的问题。

items.en: We perform extensive comparisons of both our NVS and 3D generation results with respective state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating considerably better outputs with SV3D. For NVS, SV3D shows high-level of multi-view consistency and generalization to real-world images while being pose controllable. Our resulting 3D meshes are able to capture intricate geometric and texture details.
items.zh: 我们对我们的 NVS 和 3D 生成结果与各自的最先进方法进行了广泛比较，展示了 SV3D 显著更好的输出。对于 NVS，SV3D 在姿态可控的同时，表现出高水平的多视角一致性和对真实世界图像的泛化能力。我们生成的 3D 网格能够捕捉复杂的几何和纹理细节。

items.en: We organize the related works along three crucial aspects of novel view synthesis (NVS): generalization, controllability, and multi-view (3D) consistency.
items.zh: 我们沿着新视角合成 (NVS) 的三个关键方面组织相关工作：泛化性、可控性和多视角（3D）一致性。

items.en: Generalization. Diffusion models [14, 47] have recently shown to be powerful generative models that can generate a wide variety of images [3, 40, 39] and videos [2, 51, 12] by iteratively denoising a noise sample. Among these models, the publicly available Stable Diffusion (SD) [39] and Stable Video Diffusion (SVD) [2] demonstrate strong generalization ability by being trained on extremely large datasets like LAION [42] and LVD [2]. Hence, they are commonly used as foundation models for various generation tasks, e.g. novel view synthesis.
items.zh: 泛化性。扩散模型 [14, 47] 最近已被证明是强大的生成模型，可以通过对噪声样本进行迭代去噪来生成各种图像 [3, 40, 39] 和视频 [2, 51, 12]。在这些模型中，公开可用的 Stable Diffusion (SD) [39] 和 Stable Video Diffusion (SVD) [2] 通过在极大规模数据集（如 LAION [42] 和 LVD [2]）上训练，展示了强大的泛化能力。因此，它们通常被用作各种生成任务（例如新视角合成）的基础模型。

items.en: Controllability. Ideally, a controllable NVS model allows us to generate an image corresponding to any arbitrary viewpoint. For this, Zero123 [25] repurposes an image diffusion model to a novel view synthesizer, conditioned on a single-view image and the pose difference between the input and target views. Follow-up works such as Zero123XL [8] and Stable Zero123 [48] advance the quality of diffusion-based NVS, as well as the trained NeRFs using SDS loss. However, these methods only generate one novel view at a time, and thus are not designed to be multi-view consistent inherently. Recent works such as EscherNet [20] and Free3D [62] are capable of generating with intelligent camera position embedding design encouraging better multi-view consistency. However, they only make use of image-based diffusion models, and generate images at 256×\times256 resolution. We finetune a video diffusion model to generate novel views at 576×\times576 resolution.
items.zh: 可控性。理想情况下，一个可控的 NVS 模型允许我们生成对应于任意视点的图像。为此，Zero123 [25] 将图像扩散模型重新用于新视角合成器，以单视角图像和输入与目标视角之间的姿态差为条件。后续工作如 Zero123XL [8] 和 Stable Zero123 [48] 提高了基于扩散的 NVS 的质量，以及使用 SDS 损失训练的 NeRF。然而，这些方法一次只生成一个新视角，因此本质上不是为多视角一致性而设计的。近期工作如 EscherNet [20] 和 Free3D [62] 能够通过智能相机位置嵌入设计生成更好的多视角一致性。然而，它们仅使用基于图像的扩散模型，并以 256×256 分辨率生成图像。我们微调了一个视频扩散模型，以 576×576 分辨率生成新视角。

items.en: Multi-view Consistency. Multi-view consistency is the most critical requirement for high-quality NVS and 3D generation. To address the inconsistency issue in prior works, MVDream [45], SyncDreamer [26], HexGen3D [29], and Zero123++ [44] propose to generate multiple (specific) views of an object simultaneously. However, they are not controllable: they only generate specific views given a conditional image, not arbitrary viewpoints. Moreover, they were finetuned from image-based diffusion models, i.e. multi-view consistency was imposed on image-based diffusion by adding interaction among the multiple generated views through cross-attention layers. Hence, their output quality is limited to the generalization capability of the image-based model they finetuned from, as well as the 3D dataset they were finetuned on. Efficient-3DiM finetunes the SD model with a stronger vision transformer DINO v2 [35]. Consistent-1-to-3 [57] and SPAD leverage epipolar geometry to generate multiview consistent images. One-2-3-45 [24] and One-2-3-45++ [23] train additional 3D network using the outputs of 2D generator. MVDream [45], Consistent123 [53], and Wonder3D [27] also train multi-view diffusion models, yet still require post-processing for video rendering. SyncDreamer [26] and ConsistNet [55] employ 3D representation into the latent diffusion model.
items.zh: 多视角一致性。多视角一致性是高质量 NVS 和 3D 生成最关键的要求。为了解决先前工作中的不一致问题，MVDream [45]、SyncDreamer [26]、HexGen3D [29] 和 Zero123++ [44] 提出同时生成物体的多个（特定）视角。然而，它们不可控：它们只生成给定条件图像下的特定视角，而不是任意视点。此外，它们是从基于图像的扩散模型微调而来，即通过交叉注意力层在多个生成视角之间添加交互，将多视角一致性强加于基于图像的扩散。因此，它们的输出质量受限于其微调所基于的图像模型的泛化能力以及微调所用的 3D 数据集。Efficient-3DiM 使用更强的视觉 Transformer DINO v2 [35] 微调了 SD 模型。Consistent-1-to-3 [57] 和 SPAD 利用极线几何生成多视角一致的图像。One-2-3-45 [24] 和 One-2-3-45++ [23] 使用 2D 生成器的输出训练额外的 3D 网络。MVDream [45]、Consistent123 [53] 和 Wonder3D [27] 也训练了多视角扩散模型，但仍需要后处理进行视频渲染。SyncDreamer [26] 和 ConsistNet [55] 将 3D 表示引入潜在扩散模型。

items.en: Exploiting Video Diffusion Models. To achieve better generalization and multi-view consistency, some contemporary works exploit the temporal priors in video diffusion models for NVS. For instance, Vivid-1-to-3 [21] combines a view-conditioned diffusion model and video diffusion model to generate consistent views. SVD-MV [2] and IM-3D [28] finetune a video diffusion model for NVS. However, they generate ≤\leq 360∘ views at the same elevation only. Unlike SV3D, none of them are capable of rendering any arbitrary view of the 3D object.
items.zh: 利用视频扩散模型。为了实现更好的泛化和多视角一致性，一些同期工作利用视频扩散模型中的时间先验进行 NVS。例如，Vivid-1-to-3 [21] 结合了视角条件扩散模型和视频扩散模型以生成一致的视角。SVD-MV [2] 和 IM-3D [28] 微调了视频扩散模型用于 NVS。然而，它们仅生成相同仰角下的 ≤360° 视角。与 SV3D 不同，它们都无法渲染 3D 物体的任意视角。

items.en: We argue that the existing NVS and 3D generation methods do not fully leverage the superior generalization capability, controllability, and consistency in video diffusion models. In this paper, we fill this important gap and train SV3D, a state-of-the-art novel multi-view synthesis video diffusion model at 576×\times576 resolution, and leverage it for 3D generation.
items.zh: 我们认为现有的 NVS 和 3D 生成方法没有充分利用视频扩散模型的优越泛化能力、可控性和一致性。在本文中，我们填补了这一重要空白，训练了 SV3D——一个在 576×576 分辨率下的最先进新多视角合成视频扩散模型，并将其用于 3D 生成。

items.en: Recent advances in 3D representations and diffusion-based generative models have significantly improved the quality of image-to-3D generation. Here, we briefly summarize the related works in these two categories.
items.zh: 近期在 3D 表示和基于扩散的生成模型方面的进展显著提高了图像到 3D 生成的质量。在此，我们简要总结这两个类别中的相关工作。

items.en: 3D Representation. 3D generation has seen great progress since the advent of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) [31] and its subsequent variants [1], which implicitly represents a 3D scene as a volumetric function, typically parameterized by a neural network. Notably, Instant-NGP [32] introduces a hash grid feature encoding that can be used as a NeRF backbone for fast inference and ability to recover complex geometry. On the other hand, several recent works improve from an explicit representation such as DMTet [43], which is capable of generating high-resolution 3D shapes due to its hybrid SDF-Mesh representation and high memory efficiency. Similar to [22, 37], we adopt coarse-to-fine training for 3D generation, by first learning a rough object with Instant-NGP NeRF and then refining it using the DMTet representation.
items.zh: 3D 表示。自从神经辐射场 (NeRF) [31] 及其后续变体 [1] 出现以来，3D 生成取得了巨大进展，这些方法将 3D 场景隐式表示为体积函数，通常由神经网络参数化。值得注意的是，Instant-NGP [32] 引入了一种哈希网格特征编码，可用作 NeRF 主干网络，实现快速推理并能够恢复复杂几何。另一方面，一些近期工作从显式表示（如 DMTet [43]）改进而来，由于其混合 SDF-网格表示和高内存效率，能够生成高分辨率 3D 形状。类似于 [22, 37]，我们采用从粗到细的训练方式进行 3D 生成，首先使用 Instant-NGP NeRF 学习粗略物体，然后使用 DMTet 表示进行细化。

items.en: Diffusion-Based 3D Generation. Several recent works [16, 33] train a 3D diffusion model to to learn these flexible 3D representations, which, however, lack generalization ability due to the scarcity of 3D data. To learn 3D generation without ground truth 3D data, image/multi-view diffusion models have been used as guidance for 3D generation. DreamFusion [36] and its follow-up works [30, 22] leverage a trained image diffusion model as a ‘scoring’ function and calculate the SDS loss for text-to-3D generation. However, they are prone to artifacts like Janus problem [36, 30] and over-saturated texture. Inspired by Zero123 [25], several recent works [48, 44, 26, 20, 62, 28, 24, 23, 37] finetune image or video diffusion models to generate novel view images as a stronger guidance for 3D generation. Our method shares the same spirit as this line of work, but produces denser, controllable, and more consistent multi-view images, thus resulting in better 3D generation quality.
items.zh: 基于扩散的 3D 生成。一些近期工作 [16, 33] 训练 3D 扩散模型来学习这些灵活的 3D 表示，然而，由于 3D 数据的稀缺性，这些模型缺乏泛化能力。为了在没有真实 3D 数据的情况下学习 3D 生成，图像/多视角扩散模型已被用作 3D 生成的指导。DreamFusion [36] 及其后续工作 [30, 22] 利用训练好的图像扩散模型作为 '评分' 函数，并计算 SDS 损失用于文本到 3D 生成。然而，它们容易出现 Janus 问题 [36, 30] 和过饱和纹理等伪影。受 Zero123 [25] 启发，一些近期工作 [48, 44, 26, 20, 62, 28, 24, 23, 37] 微调图像或视频扩散模型以生成新视角图像，作为 3D 生成的更强指导。我们的方法与这一系列工作精神相同，但生成更密集、可控且更一致的多视角图像，从而带来更好的 3D 生成质量。

items.capEn: Figure 2: SV3D Architecture. We add the sinusoidal embedding of the camera orbit elevation and azimuth angles (e,a)𝑒𝑎(e,a) to that of the noise step t𝑡t, and feed the sum to the convolutional blocks in the UNet. We feed the single input image’s CLIP embedding to the attention blocks, and concatenate its latent embedding to the noisy state 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡{\mathbf{z}}_{t}.
items.capZh: 图 2: SV3D 架构。我们将相机轨道仰角和方位角 (e,a) 的正弦嵌入添加到噪声步 t 的嵌入中，并将和输入到 UNet 中的卷积块。我们将单张输入图像的 CLIP 嵌入馈送到注意力块，并将其潜在嵌入与噪声状态 z_t 拼接。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Static vs. Dynamic Orbits. We use two types of orbits for training the SV3D models.
items.capZh: 图 3: 静态与动态轨道。我们使用两种类型的轨道来训练 SV3D 模型。

items.en: Our main idea is to repurpose temporal consistency in a video diffusion model for spatial 3D consistency of an object. Specifically, we finetune SVD [2] to generate an orbital video around a 3D object, conditioned on a single-view image. This orbital video need not be at the same elevation, or at regularly spaced azimuth angles. SVD is well-suited for this task since it is trained to generate smooth and consistent videos on large-scale datasets of real and high-quality videos. The exposure to superior data quantity and quality makes it more generalizable and multi-view consistent, and the flexibility of the SVD architecture makes it amenable to be finetuned for camera controllability.
items.zh: 我们的主要思想是将视频扩散模型中的时间一致性重新用于物体的空间 3D 一致性。具体来说，我们微调 SVD [2] 以生成围绕 3D 物体的轨道视频，以单视角图像为条件。这个轨道视频不必在同一仰角或等间距方位角。SVD 非常适合此任务，因为它是在大规模真实高质量视频数据集上训练的，能够生成平滑且一致的视频。接触更优越的数据数量和质量使其更具泛化性和多视角一致性，而 SVD 架构的灵活性使其易于微调以实现相机可控性。

items.en: Some prior works attempt to leverage such properties by finetuning image diffusion models, training video diffusion models from scratch, or finetuning video diffusion models to generate pre-defined views at the same elevation (static orbit) around an object [2, 28]. However, we argue that these methods do not fully exploit the potential of video diffusion models. To the best of our knowledge, SV3D is the first video diffusion-based framework for controllable multi-view synthesis at 576×\times576 resolution (and subsequently for 3D generation).
items.zh: 一些先前工作试图通过微调图像扩散模型、从头训练视频扩散模型或微调视频扩散模型以生成围绕物体的同一仰角（静态轨道）的预定义视角 [2, 28] 来利用这些特性。然而，我们认为这些方法没有充分利用视频扩散模型的潜力。据我们所知，SV3D 是第一个基于视频扩散的框架，用于在 576×576 分辨率下进行可控多视角合成（并随后用于 3D 生成）。

items.en: Problem Setting. Formally, given an image 𝐈∈ℝ3×H×W𝐈superscriptℝ3𝐻𝑊{\bf I}\in\mathbb{R}^{3\times H\times W} of an object, our goal is to generate an orbital video 𝐉∈ℝK×3×H×W𝐉superscriptℝ𝐾3𝐻𝑊{\bf J}\in\mathbb{R}^{K\times 3\times H\times W} around the object consisting of K=21𝐾21K=21 multi-view images along a camera pose trajectory 𝝅∈ℝK×2={(ei,ai)}i=1K𝝅superscriptℝ𝐾2superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑒𝑖subscript𝑎𝑖𝑖1𝐾\bm{\pi}\in\mathbb{R}^{K\times 2}=\{(e_{i},a_{i})\}_{i=1}^{K} as a sequence of K tuples of elevation e𝑒e and azimuth a𝑎a angles. We assume that the camera always looks at the center of an object (origin of the world coordinates), and so any viewpoint can be specified by only two parameters: elevation and azimuth. We generate this orbital video by iteratively denoising samples from a learned conditional distribution p​(𝐉|𝐈,𝝅)𝑝conditional𝐉𝐈𝝅p({\bf J}|{\bf I},\bm{\pi}), parameterized by a video diffusion model.
items.zh: 问题设定。形式上，给定一个物体的图像 𝐈∈ℝ3×H×W，我们的目标是生成一个围绕该物体的轨道视频 𝐉∈ℝK×3×H×W，该视频由 K=21 张多视角图像组成，沿着相机姿态轨迹 𝝅∈ℝK×2={(ei,ai)}i=1K，即 K 个仰角 e 和方位角 a 的元组序列。我们假设相机始终看向物体中心（世界坐标系原点），因此任何视点只需两个参数即可指定：仰角和方位角。我们通过迭代去噪来自学习条件分布 p(𝐉|𝐈,𝝅) 的样本生成该轨道视频，该分布由视频扩散模型参数化。

items.en: SV3D Architecture. As shown in Fig. 3, the architecture of SV3D builds on that of SVD consisting of a UNet with multiple layers, each layer containing sequences of one residual block with Conv3D layers, and two transformer blocks (spatial and temporal) with attention layers. (i) We remove the vector conditionings of ‘fps id’ and ‘motion bucket id’ since they are irrelevant for SV3D. (ii) The conditioning image is concatenated to the noisy latent state input 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡{\mathbf{z}}_{t} at noise timestep t𝑡t to the UNet, after being embedded into latent space by the VAE encoder of SVD. (iii) The CLIP-embedding [38] matrix of the conditioning image is provided to the cross-attention layers of each transformer block as its key and value, the query being the feature at that layer. (iv) The camera trajectory is fed into the residual blocks along with the diffusion noise timestep. The camera pose angles eisubscript𝑒𝑖e_{i} and aisubscript𝑎𝑖a_{i} and the noise timestep t𝑡t are first embedded into sinusoidal position embeddings. Then, the camera pose embeddings are concatenated together, linearly transformed, and added to the noise timestep embedding. This is fed to every residual block, where they are added to the block’s output feature (after being linearly transformed again to match the feature size).
items.zh: SV3D 架构。如图 3 所示，SV3D 的架构建立在 SVD 的基础上，包含一个具有多个层的 UNet，每层包含一个带有 Conv3D 层的残差块序列，以及两个带有注意力层的 Transformer 块（空间和时间）。(i) 我们移除了“fps id”和“motion bucket id”的向量条件，因为它们与 SV3D 无关。(ii) 条件图像在通过 SVD 的 VAE 编码器嵌入到潜在空间后，与噪声时间步 t 处的噪声潜在状态输入 𝐳t 拼接，输入到 UNet。(iii) 条件图像的 CLIP 嵌入 [38] 矩阵作为键和值提供给每个 Transformer 块的交叉注意力层，查询为该层的特征。(iv) 相机轨迹与扩散噪声时间步一起输入到残差块。相机姿态角度 ei 和 ai 以及噪声时间步 t 首先嵌入到正弦位置嵌入中。然后，相机姿态嵌入拼接在一起，经过线性变换，并添加到噪声时间步嵌入中。这被馈送到每个残差块，在那里它们被添加到块的输出特征中（再次经过线性变换以匹配特征大小）。

items.en: Static v.s. Dynamic Orbits. As shown in Fig. 3, we design static and dynamic orbits to study the effects of camera pose conditioning. In a static orbit, the camera circles around an object at regularly-spaced azimuths at the same elevation angle as that in the conditioning image. The disadvantage with the static orbit is that we might not get any information about the top or bottom of the object depending on the conditioning elevation angle. In a dynamic orbit, the azimuths can be irregularly spaced, and the elevation can vary per view. To build a dynamic orbit, we sample a static orbit, add small random noise to the azimuth angles, and add a random weighted combination of sinusoids with different frequencies to its elevation. This provides temporal smoothness, and ensures that the camera trajectory loops around to end at the same azimuth and elevation as those of the conditioning image.
items.zh: 静态与动态轨道。如图 3 所示，我们设计了静态和动态轨道来研究相机姿态条件的影响。在静态轨道中，相机以规则间隔的方位角围绕物体旋转，仰角与条件图像中的相同。静态轨道的缺点是我们可能无法获得关于物体顶部或底部的任何信息，具体取决于条件仰角。在动态轨道中，方位角可以是不规则间隔的，并且每个视图的仰角可以变化。为了构建动态轨道，我们采样一个静态轨道，向方位角添加小的随机噪声，并向其仰角添加不同频率的正弦波的随机加权组合。这提供了时间平滑性，并确保相机轨迹循环回到与条件图像相同的方位角和仰角。

items.en: Thus, with this strategy, we are able to tackle all three aspects of generalization, controllability, and consistency in novel multi-view synthesis by leveraging video diffusion models, providing the camera trajectory as additional conditioning, and repurposing temporal consistency for spatial 3D consistency of the object, respectively.
items.zh: 因此，通过这种策略，我们能够通过利用视频扩散模型、提供相机轨迹作为额外条件以及分别将时间一致性重新用于物体的空间 3D 一致性，来解决新颖多视角合成中的泛化性、可控性和一致性这三个方面。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Linear vs. Triangle CFG Scaling. Notice the increased oversharping in the penultimate frame in the linear scaling vs. our proposed triangle scaling.
items.capZh: 图 4：线性与三角形 CFG 缩放。注意在线性缩放中，倒数第二帧的过度锐化增加，而我们提出的三角形缩放则没有。

items.en: Triangular CFG Scaling. SVD uses a linearly increasing scale for classifier-free guidance (CFG) from 1 to 4 across the generated frames. However, this scaling causes the last few frames in our generated orbits to be over-sharpened, as shown in Fig. 5 Frame 20. Since we generate videos looping back to the front-view image, we propose to use a triangle wave CFG scaling during inference: linearly increase CFG from 1 at the front view to 2.5 at the back view, then linearly decrease it back to 1 at the front view. Fig. 5 also demonstrates that our triangle CFG scaling produces more details in the back view (Frame 12).
items.zh: 三角形 CFG 缩放。SVD 在生成的帧上使用从 1 到 4 线性增加的分类器无关引导（CFG）缩放。然而，这种缩放导致我们生成的轨道中的最后几帧过度锐化，如图 5 第 20 帧所示。由于我们生成循环回到前视图的视频，我们提出在推理过程中使用三角形波 CFG 缩放：从正面视图的 1 线性增加到背面视图的 2.5，然后线性减少回正面视图的 1。图 5 还表明，我们的三角形 CFG 缩放在后视图（第 12 帧）中产生了更多细节。

items.en: Models. We train three image-to-3D-video models finetuned from SVD. First, we train a pose-unconditioned model, SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u}, which generates a video of static orbit around an object while only conditioned on a single-view image. Note that unlike SVD-MV [2], we do not provide the elevation angle to the pose-unconditioned model, as we find that the model is able to infer it from the conditioning image. Our second model, the pose-conditioned SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c} is conditioned on the input image as well as a sequence of camera elevation and azimuth angles in an orbit, trained on dynamic orbits. Following SVD’s [2] intuition to progressively increase the task difficulty during training, we train our third model, SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}, by first finetuning SVD to produce static orbits unconditionally, then further finetuning on dynamic orbits with camera pose condition.
items.zh: 模型。我们训练了三个从 SVD 微调得到的图像到 3D 视频模型。首先，我们训练了一个无姿态条件的模型 SV3D^u，它仅以单视图图像为条件生成物体周围的静态轨道视频。请注意，与 SVD-MV [2] 不同，我们不向无姿态条件模型提供仰角，因为我们发现模型能够从条件图像中推断出仰角。我们的第二个模型，姿态条件模型 SV3D^c，以输入图像以及轨道中的相机仰角和方位角序列为条件，在动态轨道上训练。遵循 SVD [2] 的直觉，在训练过程中逐步增加任务难度，我们训练了第三个模型 SV3D^p，首先微调 SVD 以无条件生成静态轨道，然后进一步在动态轨道上以相机姿态条件进行微调。

items.en: Training Details. We train SV3D on the Objaverse dataset [9], which contains synthetic 3D objects covering a wide diversity. For each object, we render 21 frames around it on random color background at 576×\times576 resolution, field-of-view of 33.8 degrees. We choose to finetune the SVD-xt model to output 21 frames. All three models (SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u}, SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c}, SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}) are trained for 105k iterations in total (SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} is trained unconditionally for 55k iterations and conditionally for 50k iterations), with an effective batch size of 64 on 4 nodes of 8 80GB A100 GPUs for around 6 days. For more training details, please see the appendix.
items.zh: 训练细节。我们在 Objaverse 数据集 [9] 上训练 SV3D，该数据集包含覆盖广泛多样性的合成 3D 物体。对于每个物体，我们在随机颜色背景上以 576×576 分辨率、33.8 度视场角渲染 21 帧。我们选择微调 SVD-xt 模型以输出 21 帧。所有三个模型（SV3D^u、SV3D^c、SV3D^p）总共训练了 105k 次迭代（SV3D^p 无条件训练 55k 次迭代，有条件训练 50k 次迭代），有效批量大小为 64，在 4 个节点（每个节点 8 个 80GB A100 GPU）上训练约 6 天。更多训练细节请参见附录。

items.en: Datasets. We evaluate the SV3D synthesized multi-view images on static and dynamic orbits on the unseen GSO [10] and OmniObject3D [54] datasets. Since many GSO objects are the same items with slightly different colors, we filter 300 objects from GSO to reduce redundancy and maintain diversity. For each object, we render ground truth static and dynamic orbit videos and pick the last frame of each video as the conditioning image. We also conduct a user study on novel view videos from a dataset of 22 real-world images. See the appendix for more details on the datasets.
items.zh: 数据集。我们在未见过的 GSO [10] 和 OmniObject3D [54] 数据集上评估 SV3D 在静态和动态轨道上合成的多视角图像。由于许多 GSO 物体是颜色略有不同的相同物品，我们从 GSO 中筛选出 300 个物体以减少冗余并保持多样性。对于每个物体，我们渲染真实静态和动态轨道视频，并选择每个视频的最后一帧作为条件图像。我们还对来自 22 张真实世界图像的数据集进行了用户研究。有关数据集的更多详细信息，请参见附录。

items.en: Metrics. We use the SV3D models to generate static and dynamic orbit videos corresponding to the ground truth camera trajectories in the evaluation datasets. We compare each generated frame with the corresponding ground truth frames, in terms of Learned Perceptual Similarity (LPIPS [61]), Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), Structural SIMilarity (SSIM), Mean Squared-Error (MSE), and CLIP-score (CLIP-S). This range of metrics covers both pixel-level as well as semantic aspects. Note that testing on dynamic orbits evaluates the controllability of SV3D models, and all the metrics evaluate multi-view consistency.
items.zh: 指标。我们使用 SV3D 模型生成与评估数据集中真实相机轨迹对应的静态和动态轨道视频。我们将每个生成帧与相应的真实帧进行比较，指标包括学习感知相似度（LPIPS [61]）、峰值信噪比（PSNR）、结构相似性（SSIM）、均方误差（MSE）和 CLIP 分数（CLIP-S）。这一系列指标涵盖了像素级和语义方面。请注意，在动态轨道上的测试评估了 SV3D 模型的可控性，所有指标都评估了多视角一致性。

items.en: Baselines. We compare SV3D with several recent NVS methods capable of generating arbitrary views, including Zero123 [25], Zero123-XL [8], SyncDreamer [26], Stable Zero123 [48], Free3D [62], EscherNet [20].
items.zh: 基线。我们将 SV3D 与几种能够生成任意视图的最新 NVS 方法进行比较，包括 Zero123 [25]、Zero123-XL [8]、SyncDreamer [26]、Stable Zero123 [48]、Free3D [62]、EscherNet [20]。

items.en: Results. As shown in Tables 1, 2, 3 and 4, our SV3D models achieve state-of-the-art performance on novel multi-view synthesis. Tables 1 and 3 show results on static orbits, and include all our three models. We see that even our pose-unconditioned model SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u} performs better than all prior methods. Tables 2 and 4 show results on dynamic orbits, and include our pose-conditioned models SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c} and SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}.
items.zh: 结果。如表 1、2、3 和 4 所示，我们的 SV3D 模型在新颖多视角合成上达到了最先进的性能。表 1 和 3 显示了静态轨道上的结果，并包含了我们所有三个模型。我们看到，即使是无姿态条件模型 SV3D^u 也优于所有先前的方法。表 2 和 4 显示了动态轨道上的结果，并包含了我们的姿态条件模型 SV3D^c 和 SV3D^p。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visual Comparison of Novel Multi-view Synthesis. SV3D is able to generate novel multi-views that are more detailed, faithful to the conditioning image, and multi-view consistent compared to the prior works.
items.capZh: 图 6：新颖多视角合成的视觉比较。与先前的工作相比，SV3D 能够生成更详细、更忠实于条件图像且多视角一致的新颖多视图。

items.en: Ablative Analyses. Interestingly, from Tables 1 and 3, we find that both SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c} and SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} outperform SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u} on generations of static orbits, even though SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u} is trained specifically on static orbits. We also observe that SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} achieves better metrics than SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c} on both static and dynamic orbits, making it the best performing SV3D model overall. This shows that progressive finetuning from easier (static) to harder (dynamic) tasks is indeed a favorable way to finetune a video diffusion model.
items.zh: 消融分析。有趣的是，从表 1 和 3 中，我们发现 SV3D^c 和 SV3D^p 在静态轨道生成上都优于 SV3D^u，尽管 SV3D^u 是专门在静态轨道上训练的。我们还观察到，SV3D^p 在静态和动态轨道上都比 SV3D^c 取得了更好的指标，使其成为整体性能最佳的 SV3D 模型。这表明从较简单（静态）到较困难（动态）任务的渐进微调确实是微调视频扩散模型的一种有利方式。

items.en: Visual Comparisons in Fig. 6 further demonstrate that SV3D-generated images are more detailed, faithful to the conditioning image, and multi-view consistent compared to the prior works.
items.zh: 图 6 中的视觉比较进一步表明，与先前的工作相比，SV3D 生成的图像更详细、更忠实于条件图像且多视角一致。

items.en: Quality Per Frame. We also observe from Fig. 5 that SV3D produces better quality at every frame. We plot the average LPIPS value for each generated frame, across generated GSO static orbit videos. The quality is generally worse around the back view, and better at the beginning and the end (i.e. near the conditioning image), as expected.
items.zh: 每帧质量。我们还从图 5 中观察到，SV3D 在每一帧都产生了更好的质量。我们绘制了生成的 GSO 静态轨道视频中每个生成帧的平均 LPIPS 值。质量通常在背面视图附近较差，而在开始和结束（即靠近条件图像）时较好，正如预期。

items.en: User Study on Real-World Images. We conducted a user survey to study human preference between static orbital videos generated by SV3D and by other methods. We asked 30 users to pick one between our SV3D-generated static video and other method-generated video as the best orbital video for the corresponding image, using 22 real-world images. We noted that users preferred SV3D-generated videos over Zero123XL, Stable Zero123, EscherNet, and Free3D, 96%, 99%, 96%, and 98% of the time, respectively.
items.zh: 真实世界图像的用户研究。我们进行了一项用户调查，以研究用户对 SV3D 和其他方法生成的静态轨道视频的偏好。我们要求 30 名用户从 SV3D 生成的静态视频和其他方法生成的视频中选出对应图像的最佳轨道视频，使用了 22 张真实世界图像。我们注意到，用户偏好 SV3D 生成的视频超过 Zero123XL、Stable Zero123、EscherNet 和 Free3D 的比例分别为 96%、99%、96% 和 98%。

full.sec: 4 3D Generation from a Single Image Using SV3D
full.secZh: 4 利用SV3D从单张图像进行三维生成

items.capEn: Figure 7: 3D Optimization Pipeline. We perform a two-stage optimization. In the short first stage, we extract the general shape, texture and illumination from the SV3D generated multi-view images. In the second stage, we extract a mesh with marching cubes and use DMTet to further optimize the shape, texture and illumination. We not only use the SV3D-generated images but a soft-masked SDS loss for unseen areas. Dashed red lines represent backpropagation into the differentiable rendering pipeline.
items.capZh: 图 7：3D 优化流程。我们执行两阶段优化。在较短的第一个阶段，我们从 SV3D 生成的多视角图像中提取大致形状、纹理和光照。在第二阶段，我们使用行进立方体提取网格，并使用 DMTet 进一步优化形状、纹理和光照。我们不仅使用 SV3D 生成的图像，还使用软掩码 SDS 损失来处理未看到的区域。红色虚线表示反向传播到可微分渲染管线。

items.en: We then generate 3D meshes of objects from a single image by leveraging SV3D. One way is to use the generated static/dynamic orbital samples from SV3D as direct reconstruction targets. Another way is to use SV3D as diffusion guidance with Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) loss [36].
items.zh: 然后，我们通过利用 SV3D 从单张图像生成物体的 3D 网格。一种方法是使用 SV3D 生成的静态/动态轨道样本作为直接重建目标。另一种方法是使用 SV3D 作为扩散引导，结合分数蒸馏采样（SDS）损失 [36]。

items.en: Since SV3D produces more consistent multi-views compared to existing works, we already observe higher-quality 3D reconstructions by only using SV3D outputs for reconstruction when compared to existing works. However, we observe that this naive approach often leads to artifacts like baked-in illumination, rough surfaces, and noisy texture, especially for the unseen regions in the reference orbit. Thus, we further propose several techniques to address these issues.
items.zh: 由于 SV3D 与现有工作相比产生了更一致的多视图，我们仅通过使用 SV3D 输出进行重建就已经观察到比现有工作更高质量的 3D 重建。然而，我们观察到这种简单方法通常会导致伪影，如烘焙光照、粗糙表面和噪声纹理，尤其是在参考轨道中未看到的区域。因此，我们进一步提出了几种技术来解决这些问题。

items.en: Coarse-to-Fine Training. We adopt a two-stage, coarse-to-fine training scheme to generate a 3D mesh from input images, similar to [22, 37]. Fig. 7 illustrate an overview of our 3D optimization pipeline. In the coarse stage, we train an Instant-NGP [32] NeRF representation to reconstruct the SV3D-generated images (i.e. without SDS loss) at a lower resolution. In the fine stage, we extract a mesh from the trained NeRF using marching cubes [7], and adopt a DMTet [43] representation to finetune the 3D mesh using SDS-based diffusion guidance from SV3D at full-resolution. Finally, we use xatlas [58] to perform the UV unwrapping and export the output object mesh.
items.zh: 从粗到细的训练。我们采用两阶段、从粗到细的训练方案，从输入图像生成3D网格，类似于[22, 37]。图7展示了我们的3D优化流程概览。在粗阶段，我们训练一个Instant-NGP [32] NeRF表示，以较低分辨率重建SV3D生成的图像（即不使用SDS损失）。在细阶段，我们使用行进立方体[7]从训练好的NeRF中提取网格，并采用DMTet [43]表示，利用SV3D在全分辨率下基于SDS的扩散引导来微调3D网格。最后，我们使用xatlas [58]进行UV展开并导出输出对象网格。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Constant vs. SGs Illumination. Notice that our SGs-based reconstructions do not exhibit darkening on the side of the bus, which enables easier and more convincing relighting for downstream applications.
items.capZh: 图8：恒定光照与SGs光照。注意，我们基于SGs的重建在公交车侧面没有出现变暗现象，这使得下游应用中的重光照更容易且更令人信服。

items.en: Disentangled Illumination Model. Similar to other recent 3D object generation methods [36, 22, 30], our output target is a mesh with a diffuse texture. Typically, such SDS-based optimization techniques use random illuminations at every iteration. However, our SV3D-generated videos are under consistent illumination, i.e., the lighting remains static while the camera circles around an object. Hence, to disentangle lighting effects and obtain a cleaner texture, we propose to fit a simple illumination model of 24 Spherical Gaussians (SG) inspired by prior decomposition methods [4, 60]. We model white light and hence only use a scalar amplitude for the SGs. We only consider Lambertian shading, where the cosine shading term is approximated with another SG. We learn the parameters of the illumination SGs using a reconstruction loss between the rendered images and SV3D-generated images.
items.zh: 解耦光照模型。与其他最近的3D对象生成方法[36, 22, 30]类似，我们的输出目标是带有漫反射纹理的网格。通常，这种基于SDS的优化技术在每次迭代中使用随机光照。然而，我们的SV3D生成视频是在一致光照下生成的，即光照保持静态，而相机围绕对象旋转。因此，为了解耦光照效果并获得更干净的纹理，我们提出拟合一个由24个球面高斯（SG）组成的简单光照模型，灵感来自先前的分解方法[4, 60]。我们建模白光，因此仅使用SG的标量幅度。我们只考虑朗伯着色，其中余弦着色项用另一个SG近似。我们使用渲染图像与SV3D生成图像之间的重建损失来学习光照SG的参数。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Influence of Training Orbits. We show that using a dynamic orbit is crucial to 3D generations that are complete from diverse views.
items.capZh: 图9：训练轨道的影响。我们表明，使用动态轨道对于从不同视角完整生成3D对象至关重要。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Influence of SDS. Using our masked SDS loss, we are able to fill in unseen surfaces in the training orbit, producing a cleaner result without oversaturation or blurry artifacts caused by naive SDS.
items.capZh: 图10：SDS的影响。使用我们的掩码SDS损失，我们能够填充训练轨道中未见的表面，产生更干净的结果，而不会出现由朴素SDS引起的过饱和或模糊伪影。

items.en: Inspired by [36, 13] we reduce baked-in illumination with a loss term that replicates the HSV-value component of the input image 𝐈𝐈\bf I with the rendered illumination L𝐿L: ℒillum=|V​(𝐈)−L|2subscriptℒillumsuperscript𝑉𝐈𝐿2\mathcal{L}_{\text{illum}}=\left|V({\bf I})-L\right|^{2}, with V​(𝒄)=max⁡(cr,cg,cb)𝑉𝒄subscript𝑐𝑟subscript𝑐𝑔subscript𝑐𝑏V(\bm{c})=\max(c_{r},c_{g},c_{b}). Given these changes, our disentangled illumination model is able to express lighting variation properly and can severely reduce baked-in illumination. Fig. 8 shows sample reconstructions with and without our illumination modelling. From the results, it is clear that we are able to disentangle the illumination effects from the base color (e.g., dark side of the school bus).
items.zh: 受[36, 13]启发，我们通过一个损失项来减少烘焙光照，该损失项将输入图像I的HSV值分量与渲染光照L进行匹配：ℒ_illum = |V(I) - L|^2，其中V(c) = max(c_r, c_g, c_b)。通过这些改变，我们的解耦光照模型能够正确表达光照变化，并显著减少烘焙光照。图8展示了有无光照建模的样本重建。从结果可以清楚看出，我们能够将光照效果与基色解耦（例如，校车的暗面）。

full.secZh: 4.1 三维优化策略与损失函数

items.en: Reconstruction via Photometric Losses. Intuitively, we can treat the SV3D-generated images as multi-view pseudo-ground truth, and apply 2D reconstruction losses to train the 3D models. In this case, we apply photometric losses on the rendered images from NeRF or DMTet, including the pixel-level MSE loss, mask loss, and a perceptual LPIPS [61] loss. These photometric losses also optimize our illumination model through the differential rendering pipeline.
items.zh: 通过光度损失重建。直观上，我们可以将SV3D生成的图像视为多视图伪真值，并应用2D重建损失来训练3D模型。在这种情况下，我们对NeRF或DMTet渲染的图像应用光度损失，包括像素级MSE损失、掩码损失和感知LPIPS [61]损失。这些光度损失通过可微分渲染管道也优化了我们的光照模型。

items.en: Training Orbits. For 3D generation, we use SV3D to generate multi-view images following a camera orbit 𝝅refsubscript𝝅ref\bm{\pi}_{\text{ref}}, referred to as the reference orbit (also see Fig. 7 for the overview). Fig. 9 shows sample reconstruction with using static and dynamic orbital outputs from SV3D. Using a dynamic orbit for training is crucial to high-quality 3D outputs when viewed from various angles, since some top/bottom views are missing in the static orbit (fixed elevation). Hence, for SV3DcsuperscriptSV3D𝑐\text{SV3D}^{c} and SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}, we render images on a dynamic orbit whose elevation follows a sine function to ensure that top and bottom views are covered.
items.zh: 训练轨道。对于3D生成，我们使用SV3D按照相机轨道π_ref生成多视图图像，称为参考轨道（另见图7的概述）。图9展示了使用静态和动态轨道输出从SV3D进行样本重建。使用动态轨道进行训练对于从不同角度获得高质量3D输出至关重要，因为静态轨道（固定仰角）缺少一些顶部/底部视图。因此，对于SV3D^c和SV3D^p，我们在动态轨道上渲染图像，其仰角遵循正弦函数，以确保覆盖顶部和底部视图。

items.en: SV3D-Based SDS Loss. In addition to the reconstruction losses, we can also use SV3D via score-distillation sampling (SDS) [36, 56]. Fig. 10 shows sample reconstructions with and without using SDS losses. As shown in Fig. 10 (left), although training with a dynamic orbit improves overall visibility, we observe that sometimes the output texture is still noisy, perhaps due to partial visibility, self-occlusions, or inconsistent texture/shape between images. Hence, we handle those unseen areas using SDS loss [36] with SV3D as a diffusion guidance.
items.zh: 基于SV3D的SDS损失。除了重建损失，我们还可以通过分数蒸馏采样（SDS）[36, 56]使用SV3D。图10展示了使用和不使用SDS损失的样本重建。如图10（左）所示，尽管使用动态轨道训练改善了整体可见性，但我们观察到输出纹理有时仍然嘈杂，可能是由于部分可见性、自遮挡或图像间纹理/形状不一致。因此，我们使用SDS损失[36]结合SV3D作为扩散引导来处理这些未见区域。

items.en: We sample a random camera orbit 𝝅randsubscript𝝅rand\bm{\pi}_{\text{rand}}, and use our 3D NeRF/DMTet parameterized by θ𝜃\theta to render the views 𝐉^^𝐉{\hat{\bf J}} of the object along 𝝅randsubscript𝝅rand\bm{\pi}_{\text{rand}}. Then, noise ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon at level t𝑡t is added to the latent embedding 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡{\mathbf{z}}_{t} of 𝐉^^𝐉{\hat{\bf J}}, and the following SDS loss (taken expectation over t𝑡t and ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon) is backpropagated through the differentiable rendering pipeline: ℒsds=w​(t)​(ϵϕ​(𝐳t;𝐈,𝝅rand,t)−ϵ)​∂𝐉^∂θ,subscriptℒsds𝑤𝑡subscriptitalic-ϵitalic-ϕsubscript𝐳𝑡𝐈subscript𝝅rand𝑡italic-ϵ^𝐉𝜃\mathcal{L}_{\text{sds}}=w(t)\big{(}\epsilon_{\phi}({\bf z}_{t};{\bf I},\bm{\pi}_{\text{rand}},t)-\epsilon\big{)}\frac{\partial\hat{\bf{J}}}{\partial\theta}, where w𝑤w is t𝑡t-dependent weight, ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and ϵϕsubscriptitalic-ϵitalic-ϕ\epsilon_{\phi} are the added and predicted noise, and ϕitalic-ϕ\phi and θ𝜃\theta are the parameters of SV3D and NeRF/DMTet, respectively. See Fig. 7 for an illustration of these loss functions in the overall pipeline.
items.zh: 我们采样一个随机相机轨道π_rand，并使用由θ参数化的3D NeRF/DMTet沿π_rand渲染对象的视图Ĵ。然后，将t级别的噪声ϵ添加到Ĵ的潜在嵌入z_t中，并通过可微分渲染管道反向传播以下SDS损失（对t和ϵ取期望）：ℒ_sds = w(t)(ϵ_ϕ(z_t; I, π_rand, t) - ϵ) ∂Ĵ/∂θ，其中w是依赖于t的权重，ϵ和ϵ_ϕ分别是添加的噪声和预测的噪声，ϕ和θ分别是SV3D和NeRF/DMTet的参数。图7展示了这些损失函数在整体管道中的示意。

items.en: Masked SDS Loss. As shown in Fig. 10 (middle), in our experiments we found that adding the SDS loss naively can cause unstable training and unfaithful texture to the input images such as oversaturation or blurry artifacts. Therefore, we design a soft masking mechanism to only apply SDS loss on the unseen/occluded areas, allowing it to inpaint the missing details while preserving the texture of clearly-visible surfaces in the training orbit (as seen in Fig. 10 (right)). Also, we only apply the masked SDS loss in the final stage of DMTet optimization, which greatly increased the convergence speed.
items.zh: 掩码SDS损失。如图10（中）所示，在我们的实验中，我们发现简单地添加SDS损失会导致训练不稳定以及纹理与输入图像不忠实，例如过饱和或模糊伪影。因此，我们设计了一种软掩码机制，仅对未见/遮挡区域应用SDS损失，使其能够修复缺失细节，同时保留训练轨道中清晰可见表面的纹理（如图10（右）所示）。此外，我们仅在DMTet优化的最后阶段应用掩码SDS损失，这大大提高了收敛速度。

items.en: We apply SDS loss on only those pixels in the random orbit views that are not likely visible in the reference orbit views. For this, we first render the object from the random camera orbit 𝝅randsubscript𝝅rand\bm{\pi}_{\text{rand}}. For each random camera view, we obtain the visible surface points 𝒑∈ℝ3𝒑superscriptℝ3\bm{p}\in\mathbb{R}^{3} and their corresponding surface normals 𝒏𝒏\bm{n}. Then, for each reference camera i𝑖i, we calculate the view directions 𝒗isubscript𝒗𝑖\bm{v}_{i} of the surface 𝒑𝒑\bm{p} towards its position 𝝅¯refi∈ℝ3superscriptsubscriptbold-¯𝝅ref𝑖superscriptℝ3\bm{\bar{\pi}}_{\text{ref}}^{i}\in\mathbb{R}^{3} (calculated from 𝝅refi∈ℝ2superscriptsubscript𝝅ref𝑖superscriptℝ2\bm{\pi}_{\text{ref}}^{i}\in\mathbb{R}^{2}) as 𝒗i=𝝅¯refi−𝒑‖𝝅¯refi−𝒑‖subscript𝒗𝑖superscriptsubscriptbold-¯𝝅ref𝑖𝒑normsuperscriptsubscriptbold-¯𝝅ref𝑖𝒑\bm{v}_{i}=\frac{\bm{\bar{\pi}}_{\text{ref}}^{i}-\bm{p}}{||\bm{\bar{\pi}}_{\text{ref}}^{i}-\bm{p}||}. We infer the visibility of this surface from the reference camera based on the dot product between 𝒗isubscript𝒗𝑖\bm{v}_{i} and 𝒏𝒏\bm{n} i.e. 𝒗i⋅𝒏⋅subscript𝒗𝑖𝒏\bm{v}_{i}\cdot\bm{n}. Since higher values roughly indicate more visibility of the surface from the reference camera, we chose that reference camera c𝑐c that has maximum likelihood of visibility: c=maxi⁡(𝒗i⋅𝒏)𝑐subscript𝑖⋅subscript𝒗𝑖𝒏c=\max_{i}\left(\bm{v}_{i}\cdot\bm{n}\right). As we only want to apply SDS loss to unseen or grazing angle areas from c𝑐c, we use the smoothstep function fssubscript𝑓𝑠f_{s} to smoothly clip to c𝑐c’s visibility range 𝒗c⋅𝒏⋅subscript𝒗𝑐𝒏\bm{v}_{c}\cdot\bm{n}. In this way, we create a pseudo visibility mask M=1−fs​(𝒗c⋅𝒏,0,0.5)𝑀1subscript𝑓s⋅subscript𝒗𝑐𝒏00.5M=1-f_{\text{s}}\left(\bm{v}_{c}\cdot\bm{n},0,0.5\right), where fs​(x;f0,f1)=x^2​(3−2​x)subscript𝑓s𝑥subscript𝑓0subscript𝑓1superscript^𝑥232𝑥f_{\text{s}}(x;f_{0},f_{1})=\hat{x}^{2}(3-2x), with x^=x−f0f1−f0^𝑥𝑥subscript𝑓0subscript𝑓1subscript𝑓0\hat{x}=\frac{x-f_{0}}{f_{1}-f_{0}}. Thus, M𝑀M is calculated for each random camera render, and the combined visibility mask 𝐌𝐌{\mathbf{M}} is applied to SDS loss: ℒmask-sds=𝐌​ℒsdssubscriptℒmask-sds𝐌subscriptℒsds\mathcal{L}_{\text{mask-sds}}={\mathbf{M}}\mathcal{L}_{\text{sds}}.
items.zh: 我们仅对随机轨道视图中那些在参考轨道视图中不太可能可见的像素应用SDS损失。为此，我们首先从随机相机轨道π_rand渲染对象。对于每个随机相机视图，我们获得可见表面点p∈R^3及其对应的表面法线n。然后，对于每个参考相机i，我们计算表面p朝向其位置π̄_ref^i∈R^3（从π_ref^i∈R^2计算得到）的视线方向v_i = (π̄_ref^i - p)/||π̄_ref^i - p||。我们基于v_i与n的点积（即v_i·n）推断该表面从参考相机的可见性。由于较高的值大致表示表面从参考相机更可见，我们选择具有最大可见性可能性的参考相机c：c = max_i(v_i·n)。由于我们只想对c的未见或掠射角区域应用SDS损失，我们使用平滑阶跃函数f_s将v_c·n平滑裁剪到c的可见性范围。这样，我们创建了一个伪可见性掩码M = 1 - f_s(v_c·n, 0, 0.5)，其中f_s(x; f_0, f_1) = x̂^2(3 - 2x̂)，x̂ = (x - f_0)/(f_1 - f_0)。因此，M是针对每个随机相机渲染计算的，组合后的可见性掩码M应用于SDS损失：ℒ_mask-sds = M ℒ_sds。

items.en: Geometric Priors. Since our rendering-based optimization operates at the image level, we adopt several geometric priors to regularize the output shapes. We add a smooth depth loss from RegNeRF [34] and a bilateral normal smoothness loss [5] to encourage smooth 3D surfaces where the projected image gradients are low. Moreover, we obtain normal estimates from Omnidata [11] and calculate a mono normal loss similar to MonoSDF [59], which can effectively reduce noisy surfaces in the output mesh. Further details about the training losses and optimization process are available in the appendix.
items.zh: 几何先验。由于我们的基于渲染的优化在图像级别进行，我们采用了几何先验来正则化输出形状。我们添加了来自RegNeRF [34]的平滑深度损失和双边法线平滑度损失[5]，以在投影图像梯度较低的区域鼓励平滑的3D表面。此外，我们从Omnidata [11]获取法线估计，并计算类似于MonoSDF [59]的单目法线损失，这可以有效减少输出网格中的噪声表面。关于训练损失和优化过程的更多细节见附录。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Visual Comparison of 3D Meshes. For each object, we show the conditioning image (left), and the output meshes rendered in two different views. Our generated meshes are more detailed, faithful to input images, and consistent in 3D. This demonstrates the quality of novel multi-view synthesis by our SV3D model.
items.capZh: 图11：3D网格的视觉比较。对于每个对象，我们展示条件图像（左）和两个不同视角渲染的输出网格。我们生成的网格更详细、忠实于输入图像，并且在3D中一致。这展示了我们SV3D模型新颖多视图合成的质量。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Real-World 3D Results. Notice the accurate shape and details in our reconstructions even from the diverse images in-the-wild.
items.capZh: 图12：真实世界3D结果。注意，即使来自野外多样图像，我们的重建也具有准确的形状和细节。

items.en: Due to the strong regularization, we only require 600 steps in the coarse stage and 1000 in the fine stage. Overall, the entire mesh extraction process takes ≈\approx8 minutes without SDS loss, and ≈\approx20 minutes with SDS loss. The coarse stage only takes ≈\approx2 minutes and provides a full 3D representation of the object.
items.zh: 由于强正则化，我们在粗阶段仅需600步，细阶段1000步。总体而言，整个网格提取过程在不使用SDS损失时大约需要8分钟，使用SDS损失时大约需要20分钟。粗阶段仅需大约2分钟，并提供对象的完整3D表示。

items.en: Evaluation. We evaluate our 3D generation framework on 50 randomly sampled objects from the GSO dataset as described in Sec. 3.1. We compute image-based reconstruction metrics (LPIPS, PSNR, SSIM, MSE, and CLIP-S) between the ground truth (GT) GSO images, and rendered images from the trained 3D meshes on the same static/dynamic orbits. In addition, we compute 3D reconstruction metrics of Chamfer distance (CD) and 3D IoU between the GT and predicted meshes. We compare our SV3D-guided 3D generations with several prior methods including Point-E [33], Shap-E [16], One-2-3-45++ [23], DreamGaussian [49], SyncDreamer [26], EscherNet [20], Free3D [62], and Stable Zero123 [48].
items.zh: 评估。我们在从GSO数据集中随机采样的50个对象上评估我们的3D生成框架，如第3.1节所述。我们计算了真值GSO图像与在相同静态/动态轨道上训练的3D网格渲染图像之间的基于图像的重建指标（LPIPS、PSNR、SSIM、MSE和CLIP-S）。此外，我们计算了真值与预测网格之间的3D重建指标：Chamfer距离（CD）和3D IoU。我们将我们的SV3D引导的3D生成与几种先前方法进行比较，包括Point-E [33]、Shap-E [16]、One-2-3-45++ [23]、DreamGaussian [49]、SyncDreamer [26]、EscherNet [20]、Free3D [62]和Stable Zero123 [48]。

items.en: Visual Comparison. In Fig. 11, we show visual comparison of our results with those from prior methods. Qualitatively, Point-E [33] and Shap-E [16] often produce incomplete 3D shapes. DreamGaussian [49], SyncDreamer [26], EscherNet [20], and Free3D [62] outputs tend to contain rough surfaces. One-2-3-45++ [23] and Stable Zero123 [48] are able to reconstruct meshes with smooth surface, but lack geometric details. Our mesh outputs are detailed, faithful to input image, and consistent in 3D (see appendix for more examples). We also show 3D mesh renders from real-world images in Fig. 12.
items.zh: 视觉比较。在图11中，我们展示了我们的结果与先前方法的视觉比较。定性上，Point-E [33]和Shap-E [16]通常产生不完整的3D形状。DreamGaussian [49]、SyncDreamer [26]、EscherNet [20]和Free3D [62]的输出往往包含粗糙表面。One-2-3-45++ [23]和Stable Zero123 [48]能够重建具有光滑表面的网格，但缺乏几何细节。我们的网格输出详细、忠实于输入图像，并且在3D中一致（更多示例见附录）。我们还在图12中展示了来自真实世界图像的3D网格渲染。

items.en: Quantitative Comparison. Tables 5 and 6 show the 2D and 3D metric comparisons respectively. All our 3D models achieve better 2D and 3D metrics compared to the prior and concurrent methods, showing the high-fidelity texture and geometry of our output meshes. We render all 3D meshes on the same dynamic orbits and compare them against the GT renders. Our best model, SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}, performs comparably to using GT renders for reconstruction in terms of the 3D metrics, which further demonstrates the 3D consistency of our generated images.
items.zh: 定量比较。表5和表6分别显示了2D和3D指标比较。我们所有的3D模型在2D和3D指标上都优于先前和同期方法，展示了我们输出网格的高保真纹理和几何。我们在相同的动态轨道上渲染所有3D网格，并与真值渲染进行比较。我们最好的模型SV3D^p在3D指标上与使用真值渲染进行重建的性能相当，这进一步证明了我们生成图像的3D一致性。

items.en: Effects of Photometric and (Masked) SDS Loss. As shown in Tables 5 and 6, the 3D outputs using both photometric and Masked SDS losses (‘SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p}’) achieves the best results, while training without SDS (‘SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} no SDS’) leads to marginally lower performance. This demonstrates that the images generated by SV3D are high-quality reconstruction targets, and are often sufficient for 3D generation without the cumbersome SDS-based optimization. Nevertheless, adding SDS generally improves quality, as also shown in Fig. 10.
items.zh: 光度损失和（掩码）SDS损失的影响。如表5和表6所示，同时使用光度损失和掩码SDS损失的3D输出（'SV3D^p'）取得了最佳结果，而不使用SDS训练（'SV3D^p no SDS'）导致性能略有下降。这表明SV3D生成的图像是高质量的重建目标，通常足以用于3D生成，无需繁琐的基于SDS的优化。尽管如此，添加SDS通常会提高质量，如图10所示。

items.en: Effects of SV3D Model and Training Orbit. As shown in Tables 5 and 6, SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} achieves the best performance among the three SV3D models, indicating that its synthesized novel views are most faithful to the input image and consistent in 3D. On the other hand, SV3DusuperscriptSV3D𝑢\text{SV3D}^{u} shares the same disadvantage as several prior works in that it can only generate views at the same elevation, which is insufficient to build a legible 3D object, as shown in Fig. 9. This also leads to the worse performance of ‘SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} with static orbit’ in Tables 5 and 6. Overall, SV3DpsuperscriptSV3D𝑝\text{SV3D}^{p} with dynamic orbit and masked SDS loss performs favorably against all other configurations since it can leverage more diverse views of the object.
items.zh: SV3D模型与训练轨道的影响。如表5和表6所示，SV3D^p在三种SV3D模型中表现最佳，表明其合成的新视图对输入图像最忠实且在3D上保持一致。另一方面，SV3D^u与先前的一些工作存在相同的缺点，即只能生成同一仰角的视图，这不足以构建清晰的3D物体，如图9所示。这也导致了表5和表6中“SV3D^p with static orbit”的性能较差。总体而言，采用动态轨道和掩蔽SDS损失的SV3D^p在所有其他配置中表现优异，因为它能够利用物体更多样化的视图。

items.en: Limitations. Our SV3D model is by design only capable of handling 2 degrees of freedom: elevation and azimuth; which is usually sufficient for 3D generation from a single image. One may want to tackle more degrees of freedom in cameras for a generalized NVS system, which forms an interesting future work. We also notice that SV3D exhibits some view inconsistency for mirror-like reflective surfaces, which provide a challenge to 3D reconstruction. Lastly, such reflective surfaces are not representable by our Lambertian reflection-based shading model. Conditioning SV3D on the full camera matrix, and extending the shading model are interesting directions for future research.
items.zh: 局限性。我们的SV3D模型在设计上仅能处理两个自由度：仰角和方位角；这对于从单张图像进行3D生成通常足够。未来可能希望处理相机中更多的自由度，以构建通用的NVS系统，这是一个有趣的研究方向。我们还注意到，SV3D在镜面反射表面上表现出一些视图不一致性，这对3D重建构成了挑战。最后，此类反射表面无法通过我们基于朗伯反射的着色模型表示。将SV3D条件设置为完整的相机矩阵，并扩展着色模型，是未来研究的有趣方向。

items.en: We present SV3D, a latent video diffusion model for novel multi-view synthesis and 3D generation. In addition to leveraging the generalizability and view-consistent prior in SVD, SV3D enables controllability via camera pose conditioning, and generates orbital videos of an object at high resolution on arbitrary camera orbits. We further propose several techniques for improved 3D generation from SV3D, including triangle CFG scaling, disentangled illumination, and masked SDS loss. We conduct extensive experiments to show that SV3D is controllable, multi-view consistent, and generalizable to the real-world, achieving state-of-the-art performance on novel multi-view synthesis and 3D generation. We believe SV3D provides a solid foundation model for further research on 3D object generation. We plan to publicly release SV3D models.
items.zh: 我们提出了SV3D，一种用于新颖多视图合成和3D生成的潜在视频扩散模型。除了利用SVD中的泛化能力和视图一致先验外，SV3D通过相机姿态条件实现了可控性，并在任意相机轨道上以高分辨率生成物体的轨道视频。我们进一步提出了几种改进SV3D 3D生成的技术，包括三角形CFG缩放、解耦照明和掩蔽SDS损失。我们进行了大量实验，表明SV3D具有可控性、多视图一致性，并能泛化到真实世界，在新颖多视图合成和3D生成上达到了最先进的性能。我们相信SV3D为3D物体生成的进一步研究提供了坚实的基础模型。我们计划公开发布SV3D模型。
